text: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn’t work hard.
author: Joe Cole

text: Believe in your grind even when no one else does.
author: Joe Cole

text: Keep your focus and the world will follow.
author: Joe Cole

text: Every setback is a setup for a comeback.

text: You can't fake heart. You either have it or you don't.

text: Your hustle speaks louder than your words.
author: Joe Cole

text: Play every day like it's your last.
author: Joe Cole

text: Lead with your effort, not your ego.
author: Joe Cole

text: When you love the game, it loves you back.
author: Joe Cole

text: Consistency is the true mark of greatness.
author: Joe Cole

text: One more try is always worth it.
author: Ed Mylett

text: You were born to do something great.
author: Ed Mylett

text: Confidence is the memory of winning.
author: Ed Mylett

text: Your identity is the thermostat of your life.

text: The biggest shift is shifting your identity.
author: Ed Mylett

text: Max out your life.
author: Ed Mylett

text: Live with intention, not impulse.
author: Ed Mylett

text: Your mind is your most powerful muscle. Train it well.
author: Ed Mylett

text: Don’t negotiate with your potential.
author: Ed Mylett

text: Power is taken by the bold, not given to the timid.
author: Ed Mylett

text: Don't let your dreams be dreams.
author: Ben Nemtin

text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.

text: Your bucket list is your resume for life.

text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.

text: Dream big, act bigger.

text: Start small, think big.

text: Make the impossible possible.

text: Live a story worth telling.

text: You were born to make an impact.
author: Ben Nemtin

text: Every day is a chance to get better.
author: Michael Oher

text: Don't ever let someone tell you that you can't do something.

text: Greatness lives in the little things.

text: Fight for your dream like your life depends on it.

text: You define your future, not your past.

text: Be stronger than your excuse.

text: The hard road builds the strongest people.

text: No one can write your story but you.

text: Believe beyond what you see.

text: Discipline creates opportunity.

text: I made my pain poetic.
author: French The Kid

text: From grey skies to greatness.
author: French The Kid

text: The street taught me what school never could.
author: French The Kid

text: Every verse is a piece of my past.

text: You don’t need approval to chase your dream.

text: Keep pushing, even when the world says stop.

text: Stay real, even when fake wins.

text: Music saved me when nothing else could.

text: I’m not cocky, I’m confident. So when you tell me I can’t, I believe it’s you can’t.

text: You can’t learn hustle, it's in your blood.

text: The real always survive the fake.

text: Keep your grass cut low. Snakes show up quick.

text: You only lose if you quit. Everything else is a lesson.
